# Doozers Title Workz

> Independent vehicle registration and title service in El Cajon, CA. Skip the DMV line with over 20 years of expertise in registrations, title transfers, and auto dealer paperwork.

Doozers Title Workz, founded by Lessley Jackson, handles California DMV paperwork for private clients, lenders, and auto dealerships. Services include new and renewal vehicle registration, title transfers, out-of-state transfers, replacement tags and stickers, and dealer registration support. The office is located inside East County Biz Center at 270 E Douglas Ave, Suite 104, El Cajon, CA. Phone: (619) 457-7943. Hours: Mon–Fri 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM.

Doozers Title Workz is an independent service provider and is not affiliated with the California DMV.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, highlights, testimonials, and review form.
- [About](/about): Meet owner Lessley Jackson and the team, plus company values.
- [Services](/services): Vehicle registration, title transfers, out-of-state transfers, replacement tags, and auto dealer registration.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, phone, hours, contact form, and FAQs.
